baseline.observed: API preview_sort: Some("  ") was accepted and interpreted as latest, while the CLI rejects empty preview-sort flag values.

red_test.result: FAILED before implementation because PreviewSort::from_option(Some("  ")) returned Ok(Latest).

selected_candidate.name: API empty preview sort validation
selected_candidate.reason: Distinguish omitted preview sort from an explicitly blank invalid value.
selected_candidate.success_metric: Blank preview sort values return an error, omitted preview sort still defaults to latest, unknown preview sort validation remains green, and full local checks still pass.

safety_controls: The change is limited to src-tauri/src/lib.rs.
Focused parser and API preview-sort tests were rerun.
npm run check was rerun after the change.
